stories.title: **Kendall Wells HR No. 36 / No. 1 Oklahoma Sweeps Georgia**

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells: 36 home runs.

ONE away from tying the all-time NCAA record (Espinoza, 37, Arizona 1995).

OU swept Georgia 3-1 Sunday. Wells hit No. 36. Guachino wins (13-1). Sooners 45-6, 17-3 SEC.

History is one swing away.

#OUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Lauren Espinoza: 37 HRs in 1995.

Kendall Wells: 36 HRs in 2026 — as a freshman.

OU swept Georgia today. Wells crushed No. 36. The all-time record is one home run away.

#OUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Kendall Wells Hits HR No. 36, Oklahoma Sweeps Georgia — All-Time NCAA Record Is One Swing Away

stories.title: **No. 2 Alabama Crushes No. 8 Tennessee 12-0 / SEC No. 1 Seed Race**

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
No. 2 Alabama run-ruled No. 8 Tennessee 12-0 in five innings Saturday.

First time the Lady Vols were run-ruled ALL season. Briski CG shutout. Pickens chased in 2.2 IP.

Alabama 44-4, 16-3 SEC. Game 2 TODAY — 3 PM CT on ESPN2.

#RollTide #SECSoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
SEC No. 1 seed race, right now:

No. 1 OU — 45-6, 17-3 SEC
No. 2 Alabama — 44-4, 16-3 SEC

Alabama leads Tennessee 1-0. Game 2 at 3 PM CT ESPN2. Every SEC win matters.

#SECSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Alabama Crushes Tennessee 12-0, Briski Dominant in First Run-Rule of Lady Vols' Season

stories.title: **FSU Sweeps Georgia Tech / Torres Leads With Two More HRs**

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Isa Torres hit TWO more home runs Sunday.

FSU sweeps Georgia Tech. Torres has multiple HR games in three different games this week.

Seminoles are locked in. National seed conversation is real.

#FSUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: FSU Sweeps Georgia Tech, Torres Continues Historic Week With Two More Home Runs

stories.title: **Texas Tech Clinches Series at Arizona State / Canady Rolls**

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
No. 2 Texas Tech claims the series at Arizona State.

Canady dominant in the circle. Red Raiders are 9-1 on the road in Big 12 play.

TTech is marching straight toward the No. 2 national seed.

#TexasTechSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Texas Tech Wins Series at Arizona State, Canady Continues Big 12 Dominance

stories.title: **Nebraska's Sunday Game Cancelled / Huskers Still 39-6 After Friday Sweep**

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Nebraska's Sunday game vs Iowa was cancelled due to weather.

Doesn't matter — the Huskers already swept the Friday doubleheader 9-1 and 5-2.

39-6. 19-1 Big Ten. 14-game win streak. Win No. 40 is coming.

#HuskerSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Nebraska's Sunday Game Cancelled by Weather, But the Huskers' Win Streak and National Seed Are Safe

stories.title: **WCWS Countdown — 14 Days to May 10 Selection Show**

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
14 days until the WCWS selection show.

May 10 • 7 PM ET • ESPN2

64 teams. 32-team seeding (new for 2026). Wells at 36 HRs. Alabama rolling. TTech marching.

The bracket is taking shape in real time.

#WCWS #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Wells All-Time Record Chase / NFCA Week 13 Preview**

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Wells is at 36. Espinoza's record is 37.

NFCA Week 13 drops Monday. OU No. 1 expected to hold. But TTech, Alabama, Nebraska all in the mix.

One home run is standing between Wells and history.

#CollegeSoftball #NFCA
